Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I do not think that I am being intentionally avoided, if that is what you wonder. Mon étang is simply too ... out of way.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Those seeking refreshments or peace can instead go to the shrine of Gaia below my home. Gym Kweebec's place is another popular spot pour excursions.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Then there are cultural reasons. Kweebecs share more with each other than some of the other species, but it is hard for us to get used to étrangers. I take ... more mental effort than to visit votre relatifs.

Line.Text: There is a few with very skewed views of les Français, who think that I must be prétentieux and insufferable just because I take pride in who I am. But there are not many of those.
